---
title: "Appendix B. Action Plans at a Glance"
---

# ACTION PLAN: People Ready to Act

VISION: Informed and engaged partners are empowered to implement the CCMP.

GOAL: Provide foundational knowledge, capacity, and drivers for CCMP implementation.

## (Left side of 2-page spread)

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ACTION STATEMENT                                                                                                                                                                                          | POTENTIAL PROJECTS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | OUTPUTS                                                                                                                                             | OUTCOMES                                                                                                                                        |

| OBJECTIVE 1: Increase meaningful and useful partner and public engagement.                                                                                                                                |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| People 1.1 Engagement Plan: Develop and implement the NBEP Engagement Plan to convene and activate partners to implement priority CCMP actions.                                                           | -   Convene NBEP partners and other organizations to advance connections, knowledge, and solutions at local and regional scales.\                                                                                                                                                                                                        | -   NBEP Engagement Plan and regular updates\                                                                                                       | -   NBEP decisions, services, and projects that are responsive to current needs\                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Convene partners to inventory and coordinate needs for education and outreach programs.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   Annual funding opportunities intended specifically for watershed outreach and education that implement the CCMP in the Narragansett Bay region\ | -   Improved partner coordination for CCMP implementation at various scales (e.g., watershed, state, interstate)\                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Convene partners to explore avenues to establish and promote a unique identity for the Narragansett Bay region to support funding requests and public engagement.\                                                                                                                                                                   | -   Events to promote engagement with priority science, preservation, and restoration issues and opportunities\                                     | -   Increased NBEP and partner ownership of progress toward CCMP goals and objectives\                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Conduct NBEP Science Events.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | -   Working group meetings\                                                                                                                         | -   Public support for and participation in CCMP implementation\                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Review existing local and state plans (e.g., Wildlife Action Plans, Nonpoint Source Pollution Management Plans) and compile lists of recommended policy topics that have potential for bi-state or interjurisdictional interest; then, obtain Steering Committee consensus on priority topics, next steps, and appropriate outputs.\ | -   Reports on select policy topics                                                                                                                 | -   Adoption of policy changes that advance CCMP goals and objectives                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Establish a regular schedule of communications with elected and appointed leaders at local, state, and federal levels to share NBEP and partner activities, accomplishments, and benefits.                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| People 1.2 Research Plan: Implement the NBEP Research Plan and Coastal Urban Waters Research Collaborative.                                                                                               | -   Convene Coastal Urban Waters Research Collaborative focused on the Providence River Estuary, and as time allows, additional focus areas.\                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Ongoing meetings of the Coastal Urban Waters Research Collaborative\                                                                            | -   Articulated research needs to advance NBEP priorities\                                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Conduct literature reviews of the three priority coastal urban centers (Providence, Fall River, and Westerly) to identify data resources, seminal papers, and links to other reviews and analyses.\                                                                                                                                  | -   Requests for proposals that advance research needs identified in the Research Plan\                                                             | -   Enhanced interdisciplinary networks of researchers, managers, and local people                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Compile and improve information sharing on planned and completed research related to the NBEP region.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | -   Biennial updates to the Research Plan, including evaluations of Plan implementation                                                             |                                                                                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Develop requests for proposals or direct awards to implement the Research Plan.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 2: Improve access to and use of information to improve ecosystem management and public understanding.                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| People 2.1 Science Communication Tools: Develop compelling open-source data visualizations, stories, and dashboards.                                                                                      | -   Collaborate with local water quality monitoring groups and other National Estuary Programs to develop water quality dashboards that aid in analyzing and sharing data.\                                                                                                                                                              | -   New tools\                                                                                                                                      | -   Greater ability for end users to understand technical issues and take proactive\                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Create tool(s) to document and showcase habitat restoration projects in the region.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | -   Ongoing maintenance and updates to existing tools                                                                                               | -   Decreased technical debt and shorter, more efficient workflows for local organizations, leading to faster data analysis and availability    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Build tool(s) to help local organizations prioritize areas for conservation or restoration.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Collaborate with data developers, NBEP committee experts, and end users to develop tools that respond to current needs.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| People 2.2 Ecosystem Modeling and Decision-Support Tools: Support, improve, and create efficiencies for integrated ecosystem models and decision-support tools that foster effective resource management. | -   Convene stakeholders and other experts to review available modeling tools and their limitations.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   Assessment of existing water quality and hydrodynamic models, their intended use, and a pathway toward a larger, linked hydrodynamic model\     | -   More efficient and accurate modeling tools for decision-making and policy\                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Convene partners to build consensus on pathways for development of validated and calibrated bay water quality and ecosystem models to support management and assist in setting restoration targets.\                                                                                                                                 | -   Assessment of data needs for existing models and tools\                                                                                         | -   Broader understanding of available modeling tools and their applicability to resource management\                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Collaborate with data developers, NBEP committee experts, and end users to develop technical tools that respond to current needs.\                                                                                                                                                                                                   | -   Working group meetings                                                                                                                          | -   Ecosystem management that is better informed by modeling and monitoring data                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Develop and/or update natural heritage database models to inform land use decisions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| People 2.3 Indicators: Develop and update indicators to track environmental and socioeconomic trends.                                                                                                     | -   Develop refined metrics, assess and update existing indicators, and create new environmental and socioeconomic indicators.\                                                                                                                                                                                                          | -   Indicator updates\                                                                                                                              | -   Improved understanding of environmental stressors and conditions in the region\                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Expand the geographic scope of all indicators to include the Rhode Island Coastal Ponds and Little Narragansett Bay watersheds.\                                                                                                                                                                                                     | -   New indicators, including socioeconomic indicators\                                                                                             | -   Improved capacity to track implementation of CCMP Actions\                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Update the State of Narragansett Bay and Its Watershed report in 2027, emphasizing indicators that facilitate tracking CCMP goals and objectives.                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   Update of The State of Narragansett Bay and Its Watershed report\                                                                               | -   Improved understanding of human-ecosystem interactions                                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | -   Expanded geographic scope of indicators                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 3: Accelerate CCMP implementation by supporting efforts to increase regional cooperation.                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| People 3.1 Finance Plan: Develop the NBEP Finance Plan to catalyze fundraising and investments for projects that implement the CCMP.                                                                      | -   Convene partners to identify the highest-priority projects in this CCMP Revision to pursue with external awards within the framework of NBEP’s 9-step Project Development Process.\                                                                                                                                                  | -   NBEP Finance Plan\                                                                                                                              | -   Increased collaborative and strategic fundraising\                                                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Develop an NBEP Finance Plan and seek approval by Steering Committee and EPA Region 1.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | -   NBEP project funding solicitations\                                                                                                             | -   Increased awareness of the cost, value, and importance of conservation, restoration, and resilience efforts in the Narragansett Bay region\ |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Solicit and award funding for staffing, planning, design, and construction of water quality, habitat, and public access projects.                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   NBEP project awards\                                                                                                                            | -   Increased regional staff capacity for project planning, development, implementation, and maintenance\                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | -   Funded planning and construction projects                                                                                                       | -   Increased number of conservation, restoration, and resilience projects in the region\                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                     | -   Improved ecosystem and community health and resilience                                                                                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| People 3.2 Regional Targets: Establish shared regional ecosystem targets with public reporting systems to track progress.                                                                                 | -   Convene partners to create numeric targets for priority ecosystem and socioeconomic system indicators that span watershed boundaries and authorities.\                                                                                                                                                                               | -   Facilitated meetings\                                                                                                                           | -   Improved coordination and collaboration among protection and restoration partners\                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Establish reporting systems for tracking progress toward shared targets.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   Numeric targets and reporting system(s) for priority environmental and socioeconomic indicators                                                 | -   Increased public awareness of management goals and the effectiveness of actions and investments to attain them                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

People Ready to Act continued

## (Right side of 2-page spread)

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| INDICATORS                                                                                                      | NBEP ROLE                                                               | IMPLEMENTING PARTNERS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | LOCATION                                                                                                                    | TIMELINE FOR INITIATION | ESTIMATED COST/ POTENTIAL FUNDING SOURCES                                                                 |

| OBJECTIVE 1: Increase meaningful and useful partner and public engagement.                                      |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |                         |                                                                                                           |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| All                                                                                                             | Convene, Fund capacity and projects                                     | Steering Committee, other agencies and non-governmental organizations                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Narragansett Bay region, with priority areas to be determined during development and biannual update of the Engagement Plan | Ongoing                 | \$1M–5M\                                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                 |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP; NOAA B-WET, EPA, private foundations                                                       |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| All                                                                                                             | Convene, Synthesize and communicate science, Fund capacity and projects | Science Advisory Committee and other researchers from management agencies, NGOs, and academia                                                                                                                                                                                   | Narragansett Bay region, focusing on the coastal urban sub-watersheds (HUC12 scale)                                         | Ongoing                 | \$5M–10M\                                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                 |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, Rhode Island Sea Grant, NOAA, NSF, private foundations                                     |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 2: Improve access to and use of information to improve ecosystem management and public understanding. |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |                         |                                                                                                           |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| All                                                                                                             | Convene, Synthesize and communicate science                             | Steering Committee, Science Advisory Committee                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Narragansett Bay region                                                                                                     | Ongoing                 | \$10K-500K\                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                 |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP                                                                                             |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| All                                                                                                             | Convene, Fund capacity and projects                                     | RIDEM, MassDEP, URI Coastal Institute, RI Environmental Monitoring Collaborative, Rhode Island Natural History Survey, NBNERR, Mass Audubon, MassWildlife, TNC (RI and MA), ASRI, Salt Ponds Coalition, URI Watershed Watch, Save The Bay, Brown University, URI, EPA-ORD-ACESD | Narragansett Bay region                                                                                                     | 2030-2032               | \$5M–10M\                                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                 |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, National Science Foundation, Foundation Grants, URI Coastal Institute, RIDEM, MassDEP, TNC |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| All                                                                                                             | Convene, Synthesize and communicate science                             | Science Advisory Committee, Southeast New England Program (SNEP), EPA Region 1, Other researchers                                                                                                                                                                               | Narragansett Bay region                                                                                                     | Ongoing                 | \$500K–1M\                                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                 |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP                                                                                             |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 3: Accelerate CCMP implementation by supporting efforts to increase regional cooperation.             |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |                         |                                                                                                           |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| All                                                                                                             | Convene, Fund capacity and projects                                     | Steering Committee                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | Narragansett Bay region                                                                                                     | 2026                    | \$10K–500K\                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                 |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP                                                                                             |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| All                                                                                                             | Convene, Synthesize and communicate science                             | Steering Committee                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | Narragansett Bay region                                                                                                     | 2026-2029               | \$500K–1M\                                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                 |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                             |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP                                                                                             |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+--------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Key to Cost\                             | \$10k–500k (NBEP staff time)\                                     |
| (all partners, all costs, over 10 years)** | \$500k–1M (convene partners, support research/modeling projects)\ |
|                                            | \$1M–5M (develop and implement regional plans)\                   |
|                                            | \$5M–10M (develop project plans, designs and permits)\            |
|                                            | \$10M+ (infrastructure and restoration construction)              |
+--------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

# ACTION PLAN: Water Quality Improvement

VISION: Waters support healthy ecosystems and communities by meeting their designated uses, including healthy fish and wildlife habitat, drinking water supply, fishing, shellfish harvesting, and recreation.

GOAL: Improve water quality to support healthy ecosystems and communities.

## (Left side of 2-page spread)

+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ACTION STATEMENT                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | POTENTIAL PROJECTS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | OUTPUTS                                                                                                               | OUTCOMES                                                                                                                                      |

| OBJECTIVE 1: Improve collection and use of water quality data for decision-making.                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Water 1.1 Water Quality Monitoring: Support, improve, and create efficiencies for water quality monitoring programs to continue to provide information needed for management decision-making and filling knowledge gaps.                   | -   Facilitate Science Advisory Committee and staff participation on the RI Environmental Monitoring Collaborative to provide multi-state support for cross-boundary monitoring needs including coordinating or standardizing monitoring activities and methods, developing new or expanding current monitoring activities (such as water column chemistry, emerging pollutants, or increased focus on embayments), and ensure that monitoring aligns with management questions and needs.\ | -   New monitoring protocols or programs for new or expanded monitoring activities\                                   | -   Enhanced capacity for water quality monitoring throughout the region\                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Develop and/or update water quality monitoring databases.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | -   Appropriately updated water quality databases and Statewide Water Monitoring Strategies                           | -   Better coordinated water monitoring activities\                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support expanded water quality monitoring in newly restored areas, such as the Kickemuit River, to establish a scientific basis for considering recreation and shellfish harvesting.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                       | -   Improved collection and use of water quality information\                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Facilitate Science Advisory Committee participation in the update to the Rhode Island Statewide Water Monitoring Strategy (2026).\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                       | -   Enhanced understanding of monitoring gaps and mechanisms to fill them\                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support innovations in monitoring strategies that bring efficiencies to and build capacity for data collection; encourage community science programs that help fill priority data gaps.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                                                                                                       | -   Ecosystem management that is better informed by monitoring                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support innovations for funding and staff capacity to continue data collection, analysis, and reporting.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Water 1.2 Land Use and Watershed Planning: Work at multiple scales to assess land use changes and develop plans and tools to protect watersheds.                                                                                           | -   Foster adoption of Low Impact Development (LID) principles in local ordinances and bylaws.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   Ten additional watershed plans in Rhode Island [@ridem2024a]\                                                     | -   More watershed areas eligible for and seeking implementation funds for non-point source pollution projects\                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support development of Watershed Management Plans and Watershed-Based Plans.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   More municipalities codifying Low-Impact Development principles\                                                  | -   Better integration of land use planning protective of natural resources at various scales                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Promote wider use and integration of existing land use tools and plans.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | -   NBEP Science Updates and tools\                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Create NBEP Science Updates and web applications to communicate information about impacts of land use change on water quality and wildlife habitats.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | -   Workgroup products, including information and tools to inform land use policies\                                  |                                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Conduct research and convene partners in workgroups to develop information and tools to inform land use policies for improved watershed management.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   Sustained regional circuit-rider positions at state and regional planning agencies                                |                                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Seek funding to provide ongoing support for regional circuit-rider positions that lend capacity to local planners.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 2: Reduce pollution from stormwater runoff.                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Water 2.1 Stormwater Guidance and Education: Update and standardize stormwater design manuals, support stormwater workforce training and capacity-building, and encourage public education and involvement to reduce stormwater pollution. | -   Update stormwater design and installation manuals for each state, as necessary, including protocols for maintenance, monitoring, and evaluation. NBEP has partnered with RIDEM to secure funding to update the Rhode Island Stormwater Design Manual.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | -   Updated stormwater manuals\                                                                                       | -   Improved water quality\                                                                                                                   |
