|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support education and professional development to increase municipal and NGO capacities to maintain green infrastructure, nature-based solutions, or other stormwater infrastructure.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | -   Educational materials\                                                                                            | -   Reduced flooding\                                                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support public engagement and involvement activities to spread awareness about ways to reduce stormwater pollution.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   Trainings\                                                                                                        | -   Improved protection for public health and property\                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Convene partners to review existing plans, identify priority needs for new policies and programs that target stormwater pollution, and seek avenues for policy and program development and adoption.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   Working group meetings\                                                                                           | -   Expanded use of LID and green infrastructure\                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   Studies to understand and improve stormwater BMPs                                                                 | -   A trained workforce capable of designing, installing, and maintaining stormwater infrastructure, especially LID and green infrastructure\ |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                       | -   Increased public awareness about stormwater pollution drivers, consequences, and solutions                                                |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Water 2.2 Stormwater Retrofits: Support stormwater retrofit opportunities and associated maintenance activities to improve resilience and treatment capacity.                                                                              | -   Support under-resourced and under-staffed communities to design and implement holistic and coordinated landscape-scale approaches to meeting stormwater requirements.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | -   Retrofit designs\                                                                                                 | -   Water quantity and quality are better managed\                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Fund studies and efforts to develop sustainable financing mechanisms to support more effective stormwater management at state and local levels.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | -   Completed retrofit projects\                                                                                      | -   Public health and property are better protected from the impacts of stormwater\                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support partners to work with farms to develop and implement Conservation Plans that identify BMPs that mitigate stormwater impacts.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   Stormwater retrofit funding mechanisms                                                                            | -   Municipalities have reliable funding pathways for stormwater retrofits and maintenance\                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                       | -   Expanded use of green infrastructure                                                                                                      |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 3: Reduce pollution from wastewater discharges, onsite wastewater systems, and combined sewer overflows.                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Water 3.1 Centralized Wastewater Infrastructure: Prioritize and support wastewater treatment facility and combined sewer system infrastructure upgrades to improve treatment of pollutants and increase resilience.                        | -   Compile a matrix of WWTFs with estimated pollutant loadings, major infrastructure projects, and track the status of permit compliance and project completion to foster community support and awareness.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | -   Report card identifying permit compliance or changes to pollution loading at WWTFs\                               | -   Greater community awareness and support for wastewater treatment facility infrastructure projects\                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Continue to implement Narragansett Bay Commission’s Phase III CSO Project in RI.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | -   Treatment capacity upgraded/compliance achieved by WWTFs in the region\                                           | -   Greater Clean Water Act compliance at WWTFs and in receiving waters\                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Continue to explore options for expanding the types of projects aligned with the CCMP that might benefit from participation in the Clean Water State Revolving Fund.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -   Continued implementation of Narragansett Bay Commission Phase III combined sewer overflow project\                | -   More resilient WWTFs\                                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   Annual WWTF tracking internship maintained for at least 5 years\                                                  | -   Reduced wastewater pollution discharges to waterbodies and improved water quality                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   Improved access for municipalities to funding for infrastructure projects                                         |                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Water 3.2 Onsite Wastewater Systems: Support cesspool phaseouts and onsite system maintenance region-wide, and advanced septic system upgrades or extension of central sewer service in priority areas.                                    | -   Fund studies to assess the contribution of OWTDS to water pollution where there are gaps in understanding.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   White papers or other research products that document OWTDS performance in areas that currently lack information\ | -   More OWTDS meet high standards of performance\                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support efforts to encourage property owners to properly maintain OWTDS, including those operating with advanced treatment technologies.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | -   Cesspool removals\                                                                                                | -   More waterways previously impaired by OWTDS pollution meet designated uses                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   Advanced treatment systems installed in priority areas                                                            |                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 4: Reduce trash and marine debris pollution.                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Water 4.1 Trash and Marine Debris: Prevent and remove aquatic trash and marine debris.                                                                                                                                                     | -   Convene partners to develop materials to inform policies and legislation aimed at reducing aquatic trash and marine debris.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Materials developed to inform policy and legislation solutions to reduce aquatic trash and marine debris\         | -   Improved capacity to remove aquatic trash and marine debris\                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Conduct regional needs/feasibility assessment for trash collection solutions on outfalls, rivers, and streams, and support funding and capacity to implement priority solutions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | -   Needs/feasibility assessment for trash collection solutions on outfalls, rivers, and streams\                     | -   Reduced volume of aquatic trash and marine debris                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   More trash collection solutions deployed                                                                          |                                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Water Quality Improvement continued

## (Right side of 2-page spread)

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| INDICATORS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | NBEP ROLE                                                               | IMPLEMENTING PARTNERS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | LOCATION                                                                                                                                                  | TIMELINE FOR INITIATION | ESTIMATED COST/ POTENTIAL FUNDING SOURCES                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

| OBJECTIVE 1: Improve collection and use of water quality data for decision-making.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                           |                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| All                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Convene, Fund capacity and projects                                     | RIDEM, MassDEP, URI Coastal Institute, RI Environmental Monitoring Collaborative, NBNERR, TNC (RI and MA), Salt Ponds Coalition, URI Watershed Watch, Save The Bay, Brown University, URI, Narragansett Bay Commission, EPA-ORD-ACESD                                   | Narragansett Bay region                                                                                                                                   | 2026-2029               | \$5M–10M\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                           |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, National Science Foundation, Congressionally Directed Spending, Foundation Grants, URI-CI, RIDEM, MassDEP, TNC                                                                                                                         |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Population, Land Use, Impervious Cover, Open Space                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Convene, Synthesize and communicate science, Fund capacity and projects | RIDEM, MassDEP, RI Division of Statewide Planning, SRPEDD, OCPC, URI Coastal Institute, URI Cooperative Extension, NBNERR, Mass Audubon, ASRI, Save The Bay, SNEP Network                                                                                               | Narragansett Bay region                                                                                                                                   | Ongoing                 | \$10k–500k\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                           |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 2: Reduce pollution from stormwater runoff.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                           |                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Precipitation, Impervious Cover, Wastewater Infrastructure, Water Quality Condition for Aquatic Life, Water Quality Condition for Recreation, Marine Beaches, Shellfishing Areas                                                                                                                                    | Fund capacity and projects                                              | EPA, RIDEM, MassDEP, Rhode Island Infrastructure Bank, Stormwater Innovation Center, SNEP Network, Conservation Districts, MS4 communities                                                                                                                              | Tasks will be targeted to specific areas identified by partners as hotspots, especially areas with CSOs and communities with rain-driven flooding issues. | 2026                    | \$1M–5M\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                           |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, SNEP, MA, RI, MRP, MVP                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Precipitation, Impervious Cover, Wastewater Infrastructure, Water Quality Condition for Aquatic Life, Water Quality Condition for Recreation, Marine Beaches, Shellfishing Areas                                                                                                                                    | Fund capacity and projects                                              | EPA, RIDOT, MassDOT, RIDEM, MassDEP, Narragansett Bay Commission, Stormwater Innovation Center, municipalities, Mass Audubon, Woonasquatucket River Watershed Council, Blackstone Watershed Collaborative, MA EOEEA, Save The Bay, SNEP Network, Conservation Districts | Tasks will be targeted to specific areas identified by analyses or prioritized by partners as pollution or flooding hotspots to maximize co-benefits.     | 2030-2032               | \$10M+\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                           |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, NBEP BIL, SNEP, EPA, MRP, MVP, MassDEP CWA Section 604(b) Water Quality Management Planning Grant, MassDEP CWA Section 319 Nonpoint Source Implementation Grant, RIDEM CWA Section 319 Nonpoint Source Implementation Grant, NRCS EQIP |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 3: Reduce pollution from wastewater discharges, onsite wastewater systems, and combined sewer overflows.                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                           |                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Precipitation, Sea Level, Population, Impervious Cover, Wastewater Infrastructure, Nutrient Loading, Legacy Contaminants, Emerging Contaminants, Dissolved Oxygen, Chlorophyll, Water Clarity, Water Quality Condition for Aquatic Life, Water Quality Condition for Recreation, Marine Beaches, Shellfishing Areas | Synthesize and communicate science                                      | EPA Region 1, Narragansett Bay Commission, Upper Blackstone Clean Water, Blackstone Watershed Collaborative, Taunton River Watershed Alliance, Save The Bay, NEIWPCC, RIDEM, MA EOEEA                                                                                   | Narragansett Bay region                                                                                                                                   | Ongoing                 | \$10M+\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                           |                         | EPA SNEP, RI and MA Clean Water State Revolving Funds                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Wastewater Infrastructure, Nutrient Loading, Dissolved Oxygen, Chlorophyll, Water Clarity, Water Quality Conditions for Aquatic Life, and Water Quality Conditions for Recreation, Marine Beaches, Shellfishing                                                                                                     | Fund capacity and projects, Synthesize and communicate science          | EPA Region 1, RIDEM, MA EOEEA, MassDEP, NEIWPCC, Save The Bay, URI Cooperative Extension, RI Division of Statewide Planning                                                                                                                                             | Narragansett Bay region                                                                                                                                   | 2033-2036               | \$10M+\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                           |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, EPA SNEP, RI and MA Clean Water State Revolving Funds                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 4: Reduce trash and marine debris pollution.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                           |                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Impervious Cover, Emerging Contaminants, Water Quality Condition for Aquatic Life, Water Quality Condition for Recreation                                                                                                                                                                                           | Fund capacity and projects, Synthesize and communicate science          | EPA, NOAA, Save The Bay, Blackstone Watershed Collaborative, Taunton River Watershed Alliance, Commercial Fisheries Research Foundation, URI, RIRC, watershed associations                                                                                              | These actions will take place at specific sites, in neighborhoods, municipalities, watersheds, and local waterbodies.                                     | 2030-2032               | \$500K–1M\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                           |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, Municipal, state, EPA Trash-Free Waters, NOAA Marine Debris Program                                                                                                                                                                    |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+--------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Key to Cost\                             | \$10k–500k (NBEP staff time)\                                     |
| (all partners, all costs, over 10 years)** | \$500k–1M (convene partners, support research/modeling projects)\ |
|                                            | \$1M–5M (develop and implement regional plans)\                   |
|                                            | \$5M–10M (develop project plans, designs and permits)\            |
|                                            | \$10M+ (infrastructure and restoration construction)              |
+--------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

# ACTION PLAN: Habitat Protection and Restoration

VISION: Resilient and connected landscapes and waterways support healthy habitats and wildlife and provide people with ecosystem services like clean air and water, flood protection, recreation, and sustainable harvest.

GOAL: Restore and protect habitats to support wildlife and people.

## (Left side of 2-page spread)

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ACTION STATEMENT                                                                                                                                                                                           | POTENTIAL PROJECTS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | OUTPUTS                                                                                                                                                                | OUTCOMES                                                                                                                              |

| OBJECTIVE 1: Improve collection and use of habitat data for decision-making.                                                                                                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Habitat 1.1 Biodiversity and Habitat Quality Monitoring: Support, improve, and create efficiencies for monitoring and documenting biodiversity and habitat quality.                                        | -   Convene interstate interests to coordinate and standardize monitoring activities and methods, including developing new or expanding current monitoring activities (such as seagrass, salt marsh, macroalgae, and cyanobacteria monitoring), and ensure that monitoring aligns with management questions and needs.\                                                                                                                                                              | -   New monitoring protocols or programs from new or expanded monitoring activities\                                                                                   | -   Coordinated and efficient monitoring activities\                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Develop and/or update natural heritage databases for the states as needed, including BORIIS2 and BioMap2.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | -   Updated natural heritage databases and State Wildlife Action Plans\                                                                                                | -   Improved collection and use of natural heritage information\                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support development of partner-driven habitat and biodiversity monitoring data clearinghouse tools.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   Clearinghouse tool connecting users with data\                                                                                                                     | -   Enhanced understanding of ecosystem monitoring gaps and mechanisms to fill them\                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Develop data visualization tools to encourage coordination on restoration projects.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   Data visualization tools highlighting restoration and monitoring efforts\                                                                                          | -   Increased understanding of characteristics and changes in the Narragansett Bay region over time\                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support innovations in monitoring strategies that bring efficiencies to and build capacity for data collection and encourage community science programs that help fill priority data gaps.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -   Working group meetings to convene on priority topics in the watershed\                                                                                             | -   Ecosystem management that is better informed by monitoring                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support partners to develop and expand sentinel habitat monitoring sites to explore changes to the habitat with time and under changing conditions\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | -   Reports on select monitoring objectives                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Convene and support partners to explore seagrass restoration using seed-dispersal and other techniques.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 2: Improve habitat resilience.                                                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Habitat 2.1 Habitat Plans: Update existing and develop new regional habitat restoration plans and strategies to facilitate cross-boundary projects and address emerging challenges for habitat resilience. | -   Update RI Anadromous Fish Restoration Plan.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | -   RI Shellfish Restoration and Enhancement Plan\                                                                                                                     | -   Increased coordination on habitat restoration priorities, techniques, and projects across boundaries\                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Update existing restoration strategies to include updated data, information, and completed projects.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   A multi-state salt marsh restoration strategy\                                                                                                                     | -   Shared habitat restoration goals, objectives, and targets\                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Develop a Narragansett Bay region salt marsh restoration strategy or update the RI Coastal Wetland Restoration Strategy to include the upper part of Narragansett Bay in Massachusetts and portions of Little Narragansett Bay in Connecticut, where useful. Strategy should highlight areas where marsh migration is possible and should be supported.\                                                                                                                         | -   At least one regional submerged aquatic vegetation restoration strategy\                                                                                           | -   Better designed and more impactful estuarine restoration projects\                                                                |
