|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support the development and implementation of the Rhode Island Shellfish Restoration and Enhancement Plan.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -   Updated freshwater restoration and conservation plans and protocols\                                                                                               | -   Healthier and more sustainable estuarine habitat\                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Develop a Narragansett Bay and/or broader regional submerged aquatic vegetation restoration plan that reviews restoration strategies that have been tried in Narragansett Bay to date, including current seed-based restoration strategies, and assesses whether recent water quality improvements could improve restoration success. This restoration plan should also include new data being collected on flowering phenology and seed collection and seed transfer guidance.\ | -   Coordinated meetings among habitat restoration practitioners\                                                                                                      | -   Increased coordination on freshwater restoration priorities, techniques, and projects across institutional and state boundaries\  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Expand and update Sea Level Affecting Marsh Migration (SLAMM) models to include the Palmer and Runnins Rivers and other areas of MA, CT, and RI that were not covered in state models.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | -   Expanded SLAMM to cover entire region seamlessly                                                                                                                   | -   Shared plans for achieving freshwater restoration goals, objectives, and targets                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Pursue or expand state level management plans for lakes and ponds, inclusive of invasive species and educational outreach to boaters.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Develop plans and actions to protect cold-water streams and rivers, or specific endangered and/or threatened freshwater species, such as native brook trout.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Habitat 2.2 Habitat Projects: Identify, prioritize, and coordinate partner opportunities and funding to implement habitat restoration projects.                                                            | -   Coordinate among groups pursuing priority habitat assessment, planning, and restoration in the greater Narragansett Bay region.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | -   Coordination meetings and tools for groups pursuing restorations in the same areas\                                                                                | -   Accelerated system or sub-watershed scale habitat improvements\                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Maintain priority project lists for major estuarine, riverine, and riparian habitat types/ecosystems in the Narragansett Bay region.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Annually updated list of priority estuarine and freshwater restoration projects\                                                                                   | -   Activated and coordinated local partners in restoration and outreach projects\                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Support states, municipalities, and local NGOs with planning, project identification, and prioritization.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | -   Additional fully funded requests for proposals for freshwater and estuarine habitat projects\                                                                      | -   More engaged watershed or pond groups with more members\                                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -   Additional completed restoration projects from approved restoration plans.\                                                                                        | -   More estuarine and freshwater systems meet both habitat and recreational use standards and sustain healthy wildlife and human use |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -   Education and invasive species removal events and programs                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Habitat 2.3 Benthic Habitat Assessment and Restoration: Assess and restore benthic habitats to support dynamic estuarine ecosystems.                                                                       | -   Synthesize past and ongoing regional seagrass restoration efforts including methodologies used, success of restoration efforts, locations, etc. This synthesis should assess if these techniques could be more successful with current, improved water quality.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | -   White papers synthesizing seagrass and artificial reef restoration efforts\                                                                                        | -   Activated and coordinated local partners in assessment and restoration projects\                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Update seagrass site suitability models or indices [@detenbeck2015]. Ensure such models include environmental variables of interest including water quality, sediment type and quality. Focus should be given to shallow water habitats to ensure data coverage is of sufficient resolution for a model.\                                                                                                                                                                 | -   Updated Seagrass Site Suitability models\                                                                                                                          | -   Increased number of benthic habitat restoration projects\                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Update monitoring protocols to modernize approaches to tiered seagrass monitoring, include widgeon grass, and develop sentinel seagrass monitoring sites. Sentinel sites should focus on how habitats respond to stress, establishing baselines for restoration, and include an area currently covered with widgeon grass to assess any potential transition from widgeon grass to eelgrass.\                                                                                    | -   Updated seagrass, macroalgae, and benthic habitat monitoring protocols\                                                                                            | -   More acres of benthic sediment habitat restored\                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Establish long-term goals for benthic habitat monitoring, including the use of sediment profile imaging, sled-cameras, gliders, and autonomous underwater vehicles.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -   Updated and expanded SPI analysis                                                                                                                                  | -   Increased number of artificial reefs providing diverse habitat, and recreation and economic benefits\                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Update 2018 benthic sediment profile imaging (SPI) for Narragansett Bay. Expand SPI to other areas of the region (Salt Ponds and Little Narragansett Bay) and new sites of interest, including shallow water portions of the coastal ponds. SPI can provide an assessment of benthic habitat quality trends, particularly in the upper part of the Bay as a result of improved water quality.\                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                        | -   More acres of seagrass restored                                                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Update benthic sled camera monitoring in the Providence River Estuary.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Synthesize artificial reef work that has been completed throughout the bay assessing the method and materials used, and if the reef has improved fish habitat in the area. Use this synthesis to develop an artificial reef plan to guide future work to focus on both habitat creation and resilience in high-erosion areas.\                                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Implement the Macroalgae Monitoring Protocol developed by SEAC-RI to understand the seasonal abundance/distribution of drift and attached algae, habitat impacts from drift algae, and changes to algae due to stress.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Explore using dredged materials to restore areas of exposed sediment containing high concentrations of contaminants.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 3: Restore habitat connectivity and function.                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Habitat 3.1 Aquatic Connectivity: Reconnect freshwater and saltwater systems and improve connectivity within freshwater systems to restore habitats and fisheries.                                         | -   Identify and prioritize opportunities to restore diadromous fish and to address high-hazard barriers; develop site-specific information and tools to assist decision-making, including cost-benefit analyses.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | -   Working group meetings\                                                                                                                                            | -   Reconnection of miles of river and acres of habitat\                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Conduct a comprehensive assessment of sediment contamination in the Blackstone River and its tributaries, as well as other rivers and streams with widespread sediment contamination concerns, to inform dam removal efforts.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | -   Updated Rhode Island Anadromous Fish Restoration Plan\                                                                                                             | -   Return of diadromous fish to river systems                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Partner with federal, state, and local agencies, officials, and indigenous communities to secure funding for large connectivity construction projects, including Lower Blackstone and other high priority areas.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | -   A prioritized list of connectivity needs for the six major basins in the region\                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Conduct training opportunities to assess culverts and dams for safety, resilience to heavy precipitation events, and aquatic connectivity restoration opportunities.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Additional connectivity project designs completed\                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Incorporate North Atlantic Aquatic Connectivity Collaborative (NAACC) connectivity data into decision-making processes for culvert replacements.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | -   Outreach materials to support community engagement about ecosystem changes and post-dam removal, including water level changes, toxic sediments, and water quality |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Engage communities in connectivity efforts to understand community priorities, provide information about common concerns like toxic sediments, water quality, water level changes, and organize support for connectivity projects.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Work with Dam Safety offices to incorporate potential alternatives into dam emergency scenarios that account for connectivity restoration opportunities.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Habitat 3.2 Salt Marsh Restoration: Restore coastal wetlands and reconnect with uplands for habitat migration, wildlife, and recreation.                                                                   | -   Sustain marshes in place with a suite of hydrology restoration techniques to address legacy human impacts.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -   Coordinated meetings for groups pursuing saltmarsh restoration\                                                                                                    | -   Federal, regional, state, NGO, and local partners coordinate to plan and implement restoration projects\                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Accelerate work to elevate priority subsiding marshes using sediment placement techniques.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -   Annually updated list of priority saltmarsh restoration projects\                                                                                                  | -   Increased number of marsh restoration, enhancement, and marsh migration facilitation projects\                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Explore beneficial use of dredged material to help marshes keep up with rising seas or to restore areas of exposed sediment with high concentrations of contaminants.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   New land use policy strategies adopted to accommodate marsh migration                                                                                              | -   More acres of saltmarsh restored                                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Facilitate marsh migration through land conservation and managed retreat through land acquisition, redevelopment planning, rolling easements, setbacks, and buffer definitions.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Deliver ongoing one-on-one technical assistance to municipal parks and land use programs.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Identify tidal restriction restoration opportunities in concert with other restoration techniques.\                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                            | -   Maintain the Salt Marsh RAMP workgroup project tool, MarshMap, and expand the tool to include Massachusetts and Connecticut projects.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                       |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Habitat Protection and Restoration continued

## (Right side of 2-page spread)

+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| INDICATORS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | NBEP ROLE                                                               | IMPLEMENTING PARTNERS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | LOCATION                                                                    | TIMELINE FOR INITIATION | ESTIMATED COST/ POTENTIAL FUNDING SOURCES                                                                                     |

| OBJECTIVE 1: Improve collection and use of habitat data for decision-making.                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                             |                         |                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| All                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Convene, Fund capacity and projects                                     | RIDEM, MassDEP, URI Coastal Institute, RI Environmental Monitoring Collaborative, RINHS, NBNERR, Mass Audubon, MassWildlife, TNC (RI and MA), ASRI, Salt Ponds Coalition, URI Watershed Watch, Save The Bay, Brown University, URI, EPA-ORD-ACESD, EPA Region 1                                                               | Narragansett Bay region                                                     | Ongoing                 | \$1M–5M\                                                                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                             |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, National Science Foundation, Congressionally Directed Spending, Foundation Grants, URI-CI, RIDEM, MassDEP, TNC |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 2: Improve habitat resilience.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                             |                         |                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sea Level Rise, Nutrient Loading, DO, Chlorophyll, Water Clarity, Benthic Habitat, Seagrasses, Salt Marsh, Aquatic Life Use, Estuarine Fish Use, Recreation Use, Open Space, Marine Beaches, Shell Fishing Areas, Land Use, Impervious Surface, Stream Invertebrates, Coldwater Fish | Convene, Synthesize and communicate science, Fund capacity and projects | EPA Region 1, NBNERR, MassDEP, MA DER, MA CZM, Mass Wildlife, Massachusetts DCR, RIDEM, CRMC, URI CRC, RISG, Mass ECAN, RINHS, Mass Audubon, Blackstone Watershed Collaborative                                                                                                                                               | Narragansett Bay region                                                     | 2026                    | \$5M–10M\                                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                             |                         | State Funds, NBEP 320/SNEP, EPA SNEP                                                                                          |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sea Level Rise, Nutrient Loading, DO, Chlorophyll, Water Clarity, Benthic Habitat, Seagrasses, Salt Marsh, Aquatic Life Use, Estuarine Fish Use, Recreation Use, Open Space, Marine Beaches, Shell Fishing Areas, Land Use, Impervious Surface, Stream Invertebrates, Coldwater Fish | Convene, Synthesize and communicate science                             | EPA Region 1, Save The Bay, TNC-RI, TNC-MA, Mass Audubon, WRWC, Old Colony Planning Council, MA DER, NBNERR, RIDEM, RINHS, MA EOEEA, SRPEDD, RI Saltwater Anglers Association                                                                                                                                                 | Narragansett Bay region                                                     | Ongoing                 | \$10M+\                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                             |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, NBEP BIL, EPA SNEP, Massachusetts DER, NOAA, NFWF, USDOT, USDOE, RIDEM, MassDOT, Private Foundations           |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Nutrient Loading, Seagrasses, Benthic Habitats, Water Clarity, Estuarine Fish Communities                                                                                                                                                                                            | Convene, Synthesize and communicate science, Fund capacity and projects | NBNERR, RIDEM, Save The Bay, Massachusetts DMF, EPA Region 1, Narragansett Bay Commission, TNC-RI                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | Benthic estuarine and tidal habitats throughout the Narragansett Bay region | 2026-2029               | \$5M–10M\                                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                             |                         | NEP 320/SNEP, NBEP BIL, EPA SNEP                                                                                              |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 3: Restore habitat connectivity and function.                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                             |                         |                                                                                                                               |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Temperature, Precipitation, Sea Level Rise, Stream Invertebrates, Aquatic Life Use General, Recreation Use, Coldwater Fisheries                                                                                                                                                      | Convene, Synthesize and communicate science, Fund capacity and projects | EPA, The Nature Conservancy in Rhode Island, Blackstone Watershed Collaborative, Save The Bay, Mass Audubon, Woonasquatucket River Watershed Council, RIRC, SRPEDD, RIDEM, RIDOT, MA EOEEA, MA DER, Narragansett Indian Tribe, Hassanamisco Nipmuc Band, Blackstone River Watershed Council, RI Saltwater Anglers Association | Narragansett Bay region                                                     | Ongoing                 | \$10M+\                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                             |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, NBEP IIJA, EPA SNEP, NOAA, NFWF, USDOT, USDOE, RIDEM, MA DER, MADOT, FEMA, Private Foundations                 |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sea Level, Land Use, Salt Marsh, Open Space                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Convene, Synthesize and communicate science, Fund capacity and projects | EPA, NBNERR, RIDEM, Save The Bay, MA DER, NOAA, CRMC, USFWS, Mass Audubon                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Coastal and riverine salt marshes                                           | Ongoing                 | \$10M+\                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                             |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, NBEP BIL, EPA SNEP                                                                                             |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+--------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Key to Cost\                             | \$10k–500k (NBEP staff time)\                                     |
| (all partners, all costs, over 10 years)** | \$500k–1M (convene partners, support research/modeling projects)\ |
|                                            | \$1M–5M (develop and implement regional plans)\                   |
|                                            | \$5M–10M (develop project plans, designs and permits)\            |
|                                            | \$10M+ (infrastructure and restoration construction)              |
+--------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

# ACTION PLAN: Public Spaces Accessible to All

VISION: All communities enjoy their right to safe access to nature.

GOAL: Ensure all communities realize long-term benefits of healthy watersheds.

## (Left side of 2-page spread)

+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ACTION STATEMENT                                                                                                                                                                          | POTENTIAL PROJECTS                                                                                                                                                                                        | OUTPUTS                                                                                                                  | OUTCOMES                                                                                                              |

| OBJECTIVE 1: Increase managed public access to nature.                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Public Spaces 1.1 New Public Access: Assess, prioritize, and support plans and projects to expand public access to waterways, natural areas, and urban green spaces.                      | -   Create a new State of the Watershed public access indicator that includes access to waterways and natural lands and green spaces and provides decision support for new sites and site improvements.\  | -   Public Access Indicator\                                                                                             | -   Increased public access to nature\                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Fund and support projects and plans that expand access to nature.\                                                                                                                                    | -   Plans and projects that expand access to waterways using resilient design features\                                  | -   Greater access to urban green spaces and improved quality of neighborhoods                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Complete and implement plans that increase urban green space and tree canopies.                                                                                                                       | -   Plans and projects that expand access to greenway trails while restoring habitats\                                   |                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   New urban green space plans and projects that provide access to nature                                               |                                                                                                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Public Spaces 1.2 Public Access Protection: Develop policies and awareness campaigns to clarify and ensure legal access to shorelines and inland waterways.                               | -   Create and continue education and awareness campaigns to clarify public/private boundaries on the beach or along freshwater access points, prevent illegal signage, and ensure rights are protected.\ | -   Database of public access locations in the region and a new corresponding NBEP Public Access Indicator [@nbep2023a]\ | -   Improved public understanding of how to access coastal and inland waters\                                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Develop policies that clarify legal rights to the shoreline and inland waterways and otherwise expand access in the region.                                                                           | -   New information campaigns educating the public on their access rights\                                               | -   Improved public understanding of legal access rights to shorelines and waterways throughout the region\           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   New policies and initiatives to clarify state laws                                                                   | -   Clarified state and municipal policies regarding access rights and rules for enforcement                          |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Public Spaces 1.3 Public Access Management: Support long-term management and stewardship of parks and public access points through community engagement, policy change, and job creation. | -   Support long-term maintenance and stewardship of parks and public access points through community engagement, policy change, and job creation.\                                                       | -   New amenities and infrastructure to equitably serve visitors and protect the environment\                            | -   Safe, high-quality public access points and green spaces that are resilient and accessible to all\                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Assess and improve amenities at parks and public access points to improve accessibility and increase responsible public use.\                                                                         | -   Long-term management plans and funding mechanisms\                                                                   | -   Increased environmental workforce\                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Explore creative maintenance approaches (e.g., local community oversight) and green workforce development.                                                                                            | -   New jobs dedicated to green and blue space management\                                                               | -   Increased visitor revenue and positive economic impact to areas with well-maintained green and blue space access\ |
|                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Community groups dedicated to maintaining access points in their communities                                         | -   Improved responsible enjoyment of nature by all communities                                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 2: Improve communication about environmental health hazards.                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Public Spaces 2.1 Environmental Health Alerts: Develop and publicize education campaigns and public alert and incident reporting systems for environmental health risks.                  | -   Increase public awareness of CSO alert systems.\                                                                                                                                                      | -   Notification system for raw and partially treated sewage in Rhode Island waters\                                     | -   Improved public health\                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Create a public notification system for raw and partially treated sewage into Rhode Island waters.\                                                                                                   | -   New multilingual alert materials for priority public health concerns                                                 | -   Increased public awareness of water pollution and contamination problems and causes                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Coordinate design of shared, consistent multilingual educational materials warning of priority environmental health risks.\                                                                           |                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                           | -   Track WWTF and CSO permits for compliance and notification of violations.                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Public Spaces Accessible to All continued
