## (Right side of 2-page spread)

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| INDICATORS                                                                                                                                                | NBEP ROLE                                                      | IMPLEMENTING PARTNERS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | LOCATION                                                                                                             | TIMELINE FOR INITIATION | ESTIMATED COST/ POTENTIAL FUNDING SOURCES                                                      |

| OBJECTIVE 1: Increase managed public access to nature.                                                                                                    |                                                                |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                      |                         |                                                                                                |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sea Level, Population, Land Use, Open Space, Water Quality Conditions for Recreation, Marine Beaches, Shellfishing Areas, Public Access, Impervious Cover | Fund capacity and projects, Synthesize and communicate science | RIDEM, MA DER, Massachusetts DCR, National Park Service, Blackstone Watershed Collaborative, RI CRMC, Wood-Pawcatuck Watershed Association, Taunton River Wild and Scenic Stewardship Council, Save The Bay, Groundwork RI, Groundwork Southcoast, MA EOEEA, SRPEDD, NRICD, TNC-RI, Mass Audubon, Blackstone Watershed Collaborative, Taunton River Watershed Alliance, RI Land Trust Alliance, municipalities, RI Saltwater Anglers Association | Narragansett Bay region with a focus on areas that have fewer high-quality access sites                              | Ongoing                 | \$5M–10M\                                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                      |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, SNEP, States                                                                    |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Precipitation, Sea Level, Water Quality for Recreation, Marine Beaches, Public Access                                                                     | Fund capacity and projects, Synthesize and communicate science | Save The Bay, URI Coastal Institute, Blackstone Watershed Collaborative, RWU, CRMC, RIDEM, RI Saltwater Anglers Association                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Narragansett Bay region                                                                                              | Ongoing                 | \$500K–1M\                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                      |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, EPA SNEP, States                                                                |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Precipitation, Sea Level, Population, Land Use, Water Quality Conditions for Recreation, Marine Beaches, Public Access, Open Space                        | Fund capacity and projects, Synthesize and communicate science | Groundwork RI, Groundwork Southcoast, Woonasquatucket River Watershed Council, Save The Bay, MA EOEEA, TNC-RI, Mass Audubon, ASRI, RI Land Trust Alliance, RI Saltwater Anglers Association                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Narragansett Bay region, with a focus on areas with engaged partners or community groups                             | 2026-2029               | \$5M–10M\                                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                      |                         | States, municipalities, Private foundations                                                    |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| OBJECTIVE 2: Improve communication about environmental health hazards.                                                                                    |                                                                |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                      |                         |                                                                                                |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Shellfishing Areas, Marine Beaches, Legacy Contaminants, Water Quality Conditions for Recreation, Water Quality Conditions for Aquatic Life               | Synthesize and communicate science, Fund capacity and projects | MassDEP, RIDEM, EPA, RIDOH, Narragansett Bay Commission, Stormwater Innovation Center, URI Watershed Watch, NEIWPCC, RWU, Blackstone Watershed Collaborative, Blackstone River Coalition, Mass Audubon, Taunton River Watershed Alliance, Save The Bay, SRPEDD, MA EOEEA, Mass Rivers, RI Saltwater Anglers Association                                                                                                                          | Narragansett Bay region, with particular focus on freshwater resources for cyanobacteria and fish consumption alerts | 2030-2032               | \$1M–5M\                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                      |                         | NBEP 320/SNEP, EPA/SNEP, State Funding, Sewage Notification Assistance Grant Program (MassDEP) |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+--------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Key to Cost\                             | \$10k–500k (NBEP staff time)\                                     |
| (all partners, all costs, over 10 years)** | \$500k–1M (convene partners, support research/modeling projects)\ |
|                                            | \$1M–5M (develop and implement regional plans)\                   |
|                                            | \$5M–10M (develop project plans, designs and permits)\            |
|                                            | \$10M+ (infrastructure and restoration construction)              |
+--------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
